task: Parse an AWS CloudWatch log entry and extract the timestamp, log level, and message using a regular expression
solution_criteria: The regex should correctly capture timestamp in ISO 8601 format, log level (INFO, ERROR, WARN, DEBUG), and the remaining message content from a CloudWatch log line

task: Write a Python function that takes an AWS S3 bucket name and returns True if it follows AWS naming conventions (lowercase, 3-63 characters, starts with lowercase letter, no underscores)
solution_criteria: The function should validate all AWS S3 bucket naming rules and return a boolean value, handling edge cases like empty strings and special characters

task: Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy document allowing read-only access to a specific S3 bucket with ARN 'arn:aws:s3:::my-bucket/*'
solution_criteria: The JSON should be valid IAM policy syntax with correct Version, Statement structure, Effect set to 'Allow', Action limited to S3 read operations (GetObject, ListBucket), and Resource restricted to the specified bucket ARN
